content: Official Linear documentation exposes GraphQL queries and mutations using model UUIDs, project milestones that contain issues, and signed webhooks with delivery UUIDs. GraphQL responses may contain partial errors even with HTTP 200 and rate limits discourage polling. A repository-owned traceability map should retain local requirement and phase IDs plus Linear UUIDs, while an asynchronous idempotent sync tool reconciles projects, milestones, and issues without blocking offline planning.
